description: Using SpamTitan as my main software to fight spam emails is very effective and more benefit i have seen better then other more popular brand. I am very happy with the pricing and really valuable with what i has paid. When I think about email protection, it is always SpamTitan that pop-up in my mind.
author: Syazwani I.
pros: SpamTitan has a very good accuracy in filtering a spam and malicious emails from entering my primary inbox. It is very easy to set up my own keyword that i want to include in the filter keyword and setting up the whitelist keyword. After setting everything up, the process is automated and i don't have to constantly monitoring it as it will sent me report for every-week activity.
cons: There are time that a legit email will be blocked and there are no notification sent to remind me about this activity, and resulting that email stayed in the spam inbox until i have to manually check and whitelist it. Adding domain into the software for the first time can be confusing and i had to ask for a support to fix it.

review_title: Excellent product with an awful UI
description: Excellent overall if you can get over the user interface. Solid product, solid support, Europe based.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Excellent value for money, excellent detection rate, the customizability of the v8 appliance that we use is unmatched.
cons: The UI is probably one of the most god awful UIs you'll see in 2025. It reminds me very much of early 2000s web interfaces. Almost like a PHPbb board from 2004.

description: Terrible, we've moved on to better, most cost effective and user friendly alternatives and will not be going back.
author: Richard V.
pros: Fairly easy to deploy, fairly intuitive to use.
cons: Horrible Customer Service, there are better priced alternatives out there. Often marked legitimate emails as spam with no notice.

review_title: Seldom does a product deserve the title PERFECT
description: We've had our share with spam filters and out managed email services and somehow they all aimed high but hit low - with numerous false positives, problems with mail handling, issues with some mail servers and a plethora of other issues. It's rare that I'll define a product as 'Perfect' and SpamTitan earned this title. Not a single complaint from our clients, not a single email lost, low false positive ratios and a super easy interface deliver the perfect experience at a very attractive price.
author: Avi B.
pros: SpamTitan offers the best blend of usability, simplicity and effectiveness that we've ever encountered. As managed service providers we need a clean, easy-to-use interface and SpamTitan delivers exactly that. Its filtering is superb with very low false positives and excellent spam detection. Coupled with blazing fast delivery (zero latency) and pricing that is just right - we like every bit in it.
cons: The interface has minor bugs to iron out and the message details view could be improved but otherwise it's a great service.

description: Amazing experience through initial enquiry, demonstrating, onboarding and ongoing support. Cant really fault anything they provide.
author: Peter P.
pros: The portal for MSPs is fantastic. When you first log in you get the info for all clients with the option to dive straight into the history for all tenants. This means any emails that a client may be after is normally on the front page without needing to drill down first.
cons: There is a little jumping around between different UIs, but I’m told work is in progress to put everything onto one UI. It’s still a very workable product and this is just not picking.

review_title: Buy the Titan products. Simple, Effective and supported.
description: I took over after it was installed by someone that left the company and took knowledge with them. The support team, gave me an over the phone crash course, sent me links on how to manage and in a very short time I was able to take over management of this software for our clients. I like it so much I was able to convince my company to add Phish Titan as well and between the two has severely reduced the number of SPAM emails and compromised accounts.
author: Brandy D.
pros: The ease of installation. The management console. The KB articles, the ability to talk to an actual breathing human if you want.
cons: I wish if you had one than one Titan product it could be in one management console. Running a tab for SPAM and then Phish Titan is a little clunky.
author_profession: Knowledge Management, SPAM and ESET Management

review_title: Reliable and Effective Email Security Solution
description: My overall experience with SpamTitan has been excellent. It’s highly effective at blocking spam and phishing emails, easy to use, and offers great reporting features. I have no complaints—it does exactly what it promises.
author: Sergio S.
pros: I like SpamTitan for its excellent spam detection, ease of use, and strong phishing protection. Its detailed reporting and flexible deployment options make it a solid choice for email security.
cons: I don’t have anything bad to say about SpamTitan—it's effective, easy to use, and provides strong spam and phishing protection.

description: Experience has been good. Once setup its rock solid and just works. I make it a habit of logging in each day just to check if there are legitimate mails stuck in the quarantine but mostly its because the sender's records are not setup correctly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: * The software is stable and very effective. * Ease of use (Mostly). * High level of consistency.
cons: * Legitimate email has sometimes been blocked. * Pattern filtering takes a while to figure out. To be honest I don't think i have it figured out.

description: price and features are good, stabile and fast, not a lot of false positive. support fine, problems getting solved.
author: Ole A.
pros: it's working, and have a lot off good features.
cons: can sometimes be hard to find the features in the GUI.

description: Good, as their support people are very knowledgeable, and the software is reliable.
author: Kooi L.
pros: Very Competitive price. In general, it is pretty effective.
cons: Sometimes, it does not stop phishing emails

review_title: Spam Titan Spam Filter Service - highly recommend
description: fantastic spam filtering abilities - made an order of magnitude difference in the volume of spam my company employees recevied on a daily basis.
author: Patrick R.
pros: Very easy to use. Easy to manage. Very effective
cons: I wish there was more active action to be taken on greylisted items. Greylisted emails are just bounced and you have to wait for them to come back. I would love to see greylisted emails put into a "greylist" quarantine or something so when we know they are valid, we can release them immediately instead of waiting for the sender to resend.

review_title: Good product please keep it secure
description: Good solution just the hacking has me worried.
author: Jesse W.
pros: Ease of use. Upgraded interface is nice and outlook plugin.
cons: Recent hack experience makes me nervous.

author: David B.
pros: Fairly straight forward to use and if I do have a question the response or reply is usually quite quick.
cons: Since the new update I am not sure how to switch accounts

description: I tried a bunch of products before purchasing this and i would make the same decision again
author: bill C.
pros: The support has been great, my users like the ability to check on there own quarantine, the email digest has been popular.
cons: the filtering seems over sensitive, finer grained filter controls would be nice! being able to receive a digest more than once a day would make a few of us happy. We are struggling with the analytics to understand why some of these emails are being scored as high as they are.

review_title: An excellent spam blocker for the price!
description: Its been good, but on initial setup it grabbed a lot of good email and marked it as potential spam. Quarantining calmed down after a bit - we use the service with multi-tenants.
author: James J.
pros: Setup was fairly easy and the techs took their time to help us understand the install process.
cons: The 30 day storage aspect is weak as is the ability to read contents and once its been delivered there is no resending. The multi-server cluster setup often requiores making sure searches are on both nodes or you may miss what you're looking for!

review_title: Take Control of the Threats with SpamTitan
description: We are satisfied with this product compared to other platforms, we consider it an excellent alternative.
author: Juan O.
pros: It is an easy-to-use security tool compared to other platforms. Its characteristics and functions allow administrators to have control of its services and apply the necessary actions at the moment it is required.
cons: I believe that the support should improve using other alternatives such as a direct chat with engineers, today opening a case, documenting it and waiting for a response is a weakness in the face of increasing threats and its propagation speed.

description: Great experience with till now all technical experts
author: Santosh V.
pros: Prompt response and great technical skill
cons: Good customer care services by titan team

review_title: Does what it says on the tin
description: Experience has been very positive. Was sceptical at first, but my expectations have been exceeded
author: John C.
pros: It is quite simply very effective. Reduces almost all Spam
cons: Nothing really. Sometimes, tech support can be a bit tardy, but any issues I have had have been resolved satisfactorily within a few hours

review_title: My Customer is very Happy with SpamTitan
author: Patrick M.
pros: Works very good to filter spamed emails.
cons: Nothing, everything was good. My customer is very happy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall Disappointing. Blocks emails I need and lets through obvious phishing emails.
description: Not very impressed with Spam titan. there are many features that I would like to see improvement on. overall disappointing.
author: Suzannah A.
pros: We needed spam titan to block spam from our system as we have had Ransome wear attacks in the past. Spam titan helps us to filter out any suspicious emails before they become a problem
cons: Spam Titan is almost too responsive to threats to the point I miss emails because they are flagged as a threatI'm sure spam titan is monitoring in real-time but the fact it doesn't send you an email to let you know more than once per day that emails are in your quarantine is frustrating.

description: Nice solution, does what it is supposed for, Support is good and good contact to TitanHD people.
author: Birgit B.
pros: User can Blacklist/Whitelist from EGroupware directly or mark mails as Spam. The archive of the last X days gives the opportunity to resent mails customer by chance deleted and don't use an separat archiving solution.
cons: I'm missed to select internal flow easily (mails from users within the same domain). Its easy to select inbound & outbound, but we had situations where we needed to release a bunch of internal mails and that is more effort to select.

description: We've had a very good experience. This work as well or better than the previous product we used, with much less hassle and at a much lower price point.
author: Stephen H.
pros: I like that the learning curve is small, and that the support is accurate, thorough and timely.
cons: Perhaps some form of AI spam filtering would improve things. More slips through than I care for, but some of that is self inflicted tweeks and address listings.

review_title: SpamTitan has saved me, saved my company time, and has some of the best support people around.
description: Just sorting the crap emails automatically that come in saves my company hours in man hours. It's also blocked malicious attachments which is awesome because the weakest part of any security is always the people. This helps with that tremendously
author: Benjamin J.
pros: It's as close to "set it and forget it" as you can come in the IT field. Right out of the box support helped me set everything up in less than 20 minutes, no hardware to worry about, nothing like that. Literally all I have to do is check to see if something was blocked incorrectly once in a while, white list it, and done. I've been using spam titan for almost a year and in that time we have blocked over 200k spam/malicious emails for a 30 person company before they even hit employee mailboxes. I shut off the service for 48 hours just to make sure it easy legit, it was, and I haven't shut it off again since. Whitelisting and blacklisting domains and specific emails are super easy. Support Staff are awesome and go into detail when resolving problems if they were to arise or even if you just have a question. They have always been friendly and curteous and super personable and have been some of the best people to work with in all my years doing IT.
cons: The only thing I feel is missing is the ability for cloud users to create their own key word filter. Don't get me wrong, the spam filter itself is amazing, just a bit more precise control on my end to mark specific phrases or words as spam would be nice. Being able to see the email body of messages that come in as SPF fails would be helpful at times as many company's we deal with have auto invoicing that fails SPF. Other than that no issues!

description: A perfect solution and they are keeping update and upgrade it yet
author: Amr N.
pros: Spam titan is an exallent product for email securityIt has a full of features which pro ide all the needed criteria to detect the spam emails with a very hight rate of capture And I want to focus on the new feature LinkLockWhich raise the capture rate of spam detection to a hight standard Normally if the email is clean with no malicious content it will be Mark as clean and if it include a URL which is not included in any bad categories it will be marked as clean,But sometimes the URL is bad and not included in any bad categories cause it is still new Here the link lock works and scan the URL on the fly to decide if it is clean or not and if it is not clean , it will turn the URL to a text which the end user can not click on it and keep it that way and deliver the email and even if you forward the email to someone outside your organisation it will keep it as text also which protect even your customers
cons: Nothing for now , really it is miner issues which they always solve

author: Syazila R.
pros: SpamTitan is actually really worked, and has really decreasing the amount of spam email that i have receive before. It only need to be setup onetime, and most of the time, i don't even have to monitor the report as they rarely blocking a legitimate email that are sent to my email.
cons: There are some feature that are not available at the moment on the software, like to preview the content of the spam email, without having to whitelisting the email. It will be a good feature, so user can totally know what is the content of the email that has been blocked from the main inbox.
